required_validation_commands: production version verification contract or read-only evidence
duplicate boundary, lifecycle, discovery gap, retry, pagination, timezone, and Web grouping tests
expected_results: duplicate cards are suppressed by canonical public identity with bounded confidence matching
tomorrow and missing discovery days are traceable to an explicit upstream or pipeline cause
Upcoming is chronological, lifecycle-correct, complete within the configured horizon, and cursor-stable
Web grouping uses browser-local calendar days without changing API instants
production verification never claims acceptance without deployed SHA evidence
no migration, seed, deployment, production write, or fabricated production data
